entity.label: Hazor-hadattah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: New Hazor, a city in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:25). It is probably identified with the ruins of el-Hazzarah, near Beit Jebrin.

nodes.label: Hazor-hadattah
nodes.description: New Hazor, a city in the south of Judah (Josh. 15:25). It is probably identified with the ruins of el-Hazzarah, near Beit Jebrin.

verses.text: And Hazor, Hadattah, and Kerioth, and Hezron, which is Hazor,
